description: 3D Print - slice-ready g-code sender for the M3D Micro (M33-Fio preprocessing, phase 1: virtual printer). Bundles a sliced 3DBenchy + 20mm cube test print.

capabilities.description: Load a .gcode file and show print info
Preprocess the loaded g-code (M3D pipeline) and send the M3D command stream to the transport

notes: Phase 1 transport is a virtual printer that logs the produced M3D stream to /M3DOUT.TXT. Phase 2 will add a USB CDC-ACM backend with no app change.
